explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 43 from a base nutrition score of 43. Context barely changed the result.

closing.summary: Mozzarella does have some solid upside, especially easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. but not everyone tolerates dairy well and fat quality varies wildly across dairy keep it from climbing higher. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
